message:
Add ContextManager with token tracking and observation masking

Phase 1-2 of layered context management: EstimateTokens (char/4
heuristic), cumulative Usage tracking, and deterministic observation
masking that replaces old tool results with one-line summaries while
preserving error results, communicate results, and recent turns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
